## Type

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass locally (`{{TEST_COMMAND}}`)
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Docs / README updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `## [Unreleased]` (for user-facing changes)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal paths committed
